The court questioned the U/A certification, deeming petitioners' concerns "probably genuine" and urging producers to wait for the verdict.

title: In Pictures: Remembering CPI leader R. Nallakannu (1925-2026)
description: A compilation of images from the life of R. Nallakannu, the 101-year-old veteran Communist Party of India (CPI) leader from Tamil Nadu who passed away in Chennai on February 25, 2026 following prolonged illness and age-related ailments. He had served as the CPI State secretary for three tenures since 1992.

title: NCERT row: Textbook with chapter on 'corruption in judiciary' pulled off shelves
description: NCERT has withdrawn its new Class 8 Social Science textbook. This action follows the inclusion of a section on corruption in the judiciary. The Supreme Court intervened after the matter was raised. Chief Justice of India Surya Kant stated the institution would not allow defamation. Senior lawyers highlighted the selective focus on the judiciary.

description: LeBron James and popular music icon Justin Bieber were seen sharing a good time during a recent game between the Los Angeles Lakers and the Orlando Magic. The Grammy winner turned out to be the King's biggest cheerleader, as he was seen applauding and cheering at every shot of the NBA legend. However, with a massive Instagram following and being one of the biggest NBA stars, LeBron James' popularity needs no introduction.

Younger buyers are increasingly opting for diamond-studded jewelry over gold due to high gold prices.

The trial will determine the true cause.

title: 'Huge mistake': Bill Gates admits had affairs with Russian women; apologises for Epstein link
description: Bill Gates has apologised to Gates Foundation staff for his association with Jeffrey Epstein, admitting it was a "huge mistake" that harmed the organisation's reputation. While asserting he "did nothing illicit," Gates acknowledged meetings continued after Epstein's conviction and that his ties helped Epstein "burnish his reputation." He also admitted to two affairs during his marriage.

description: Rinku Singh is set to rejoin the Indian squad this evening after a brief absence due to his father's ill health. The middle-order batter had returned home urgently, missing training sessions. His father is reportedly in serious condition in an NCR hospital. Singh's availability for the crucial Super 8 match against Zimbabwe was in doubt following his departure.

description: A Class 10 student in Madhya Pradesh's Dhar district gave birth in an examination centre's washroom during her Mathematics board paper. She experienced severe stomach pain and delivered a baby boy after writing for two hours. Both mother and child are reported to be stable.

title: Gold price today: Check rates of 18K, 22K, 24K gold in your city
description: Gold futures surged by Rs 1,322 to Rs 1,61,291 per 10 grams on Wednesday, fueled by fresh speculator buying and strong physical market demand. Overseas markets also saw gold prices climb. The article details current gold rates per gram for 24K, 22K, and 18K in major Indian cities.

title: Mexico locals fear tourism hit before FIFA World Cup 2026
description: The killing of cartel leader Nemesio Oseguera Cervantes in Mexico has raised fresh concerns about safety just months before the FIFA World Cup 2026. The operation took place near Tapalpa in Jalisco state. More than 70 people died during the military action and its aftermath. The violence has worried tourism businesses across the region.

Infantino confident Mexico will host 2026 World Cup despite violence
description: FIFA president Gianni Infantino has expressed confidence that the FIFA World Cup 2026 in Mexico will go ahead smoothly despite recent deadly cartel violence. The tournament will be jointly hosted by Mexico, the United States and Canada from June 11 to July 19. His remarks came after violent unrest erupted in several Mexican states following a military operation that killed powerful cartel leader Nemesio “El Mencho” Oseguera near Guadalajara.

'Out of love, not lust': U'khand HC on why it ended proceedings in POCSO case
description: The Uttarakhand High Court quashed POCSO proceedings against a 21-year-old man after he lawfully married the 17-year-old victim. The court cited their peaceful cohabitation and the woman's pregnancy, deeming continuation of the case a denial of justice. This decision emphasizes compassion and practicality in specific post-marriage scenarios.

title: Kerala tunnel road project: Union government grants final clearance
description: Clearance permits conversion of 17.26 hectares of forest land under Forest (Conservation) Act, 1980 for execution of Anakkampoyil-Kalladi-Meppadi tunnel road project connecting Kozhikode and Wayanad districts. Union Ministry lays down 24 stringent conditions for the execution without harming nature and ecosystem

He emphasized owning mistakes and speaking up with data when things aren't right. Jassy shared an anecdote where Jeff Bezos corrected his numbers, leading Jassy to earn trust by admitting fault and improving.

This scheme, part of a Central government program, aims to encourage prompt assistance during the critical 'golden hour' and reduce fears of legal complications. Annually, ten outstanding Rah-Veers will receive a Rs 1 lakh national award.

description: A 65-year-old tourist from Bhopal died after his car was hit by a speeding SUV at the Happy Bar junction in Assagao. Eyewitnesses allege occupants of the rented SUV attempted to switch seats after the collision. Police are investigating the incident, verifying claims of a driver cover-up.

title: Murder accused out on bail dragged, stabbed and shot multiple times in Greater Noida
description: A 30-year-old man, Nitin Nagar, the main accused in a 2024 murder case and out on bail, was brutally attacked and killed by four men in Greater Noida. Dragged, stabbed, and shot multiple times in front of his wife, Nagar's death is suspected to be a gang war retaliation.

Highway crash in Maharashtra: Car carrying liquor flips several times, driver dies
description: A car accident on the Dhule-Surat highway tragically claimed the life of a 29-year-old driver. The vehicle overturned multiple times, leaving his companion critically injured. Authorities discovered several boxes of country-made liquor inside the car without proper permits. Legal action was initiated against the driver for rash and dangerous driving, with further charges pending following his death.

title: Sam Altman at IIT-Delhi: 'Traditional career advice won’t work in the AI era'
description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman advised young Indians against solely relying on traditional career advice, emphasizing the need to develop and trust their own intuition in the rapidly changing AI era. He acknowledged that while some jobs will disappear, new ones will emerge, urging a balanced perspective on AI's impact and encouraging calculated risk-taking for future success.
